apply measurable_of_measurable_coe
  intro i j
  dsimp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
  split_ifs with h_eq h_lt
  · exact measurable_apply _ _
  · split_ifs
    · exact measurable_apply _ _
    · have : j < i := by
        apply lt_of_le_of_ne
        apply le_of_not_gt h_lt
        exact h_eq.symm
      exact measurable_apply _ _

apply measurable_of_forall_coord
  intro i j
  dsimp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
  split_ifs with h_eq h_lt
  · exact measurable_pi_apply _
  · split_ifs

    · have : j < i := by
        apply lt_of_le_of_ne
        apply le_of_not_gt h_lt
        intro h
        apply h_eq
        exact le_antisymm (le_of_not_gt h_lt) (le_of_not_gt h)

refine measurable_of_forall_coord fun i j => ?_
  rw [Pi.measurable_iff]
  apply measurable_if
  · exact measurable_pi_index (⟨(i, i), le_refl i⟩ : Index n)
  · apply measurable_if
    · exact measurable_pi_index (⟨(i, j), le_of_lt ‹_›⟩ : Index n)
    · exact measurable_pi_index (⟨(j, i), le_of_lt ‹_›⟩ : Index n)
    · exact measurable_set_lt
  · exact measurable_set_eq

refine measurable_of_forall_coord ?_
  intro i j
  dsimp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
  split_ifs with h_eq h_lt
  · exact measurable_pi_eval _
  · split_ifs with h_lt'
    · exact measurable_pi_eval _
    · have : j < i := lt_of_not_ge (by aesop)
      exact measurable_pi_eval _
